'''Mousul''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ansionian]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who represented [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Throughout the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|Mission to Ansion]], Mousul conspired with [[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai]], [[Presidente]] of the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]], and others to secretly compel [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] to secede from the Republic—to cause not only a chain reaction that would ultimately result in many other planets seceding from the Republic, but also to further the goals of the secessionist movement, also known as the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

{{Char-stub}}
